title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSDL Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSDL Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSDL Asia Pacific Associates:
NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL Asia Pacific Associates!
